reportModes.label: Monthly ESG
reportModes.title: Central Portfolio ESG Health Report
reportModes.titleZh: 核心資產組合 ESG 健康報告
reportModes.summary: A client-facing monthly pack covering wall health, service response, green wall area, water-saving estimates and photo evidence.
reportModes.summaryZh: 面向客戶的月度報告包，覆蓋綠牆健康、服務響應、綠牆面積、節水估算與照片憑證。

reportModes.label: ESG Proof Pack
reportModes.title: Audit-ready ESG Evidence Pack
reportModes.titleZh: 可審計 ESG 證據包
reportModes.summary: A conservative ESG proof pack separating measured supplier evidence, estimated indicators and non-claimed items for client reporting review.
reportModes.summaryZh: 保守的 ESG 證明包，區分已量測供應商證據、估算指標與不主張項目，供客戶報告複核。

reportModes.label: Renewal Proof
reportModes.title: Renewal Value and Service Proof Pack
reportModes.titleZh: 續約價值與服務證明包
reportModes.summary: A commercial pack for FM and procurement teams showing service reliability, visible improvement and risks handled before renewal.
reportModes.summaryZh: 面向 FM 與採購團隊的商務證明包，展示服務可靠性、可見改善，以及續約前已處理的風險。

reportModes.label: Space Uplift
reportModes.title: Spatial Value and Biophilic Design Proof Pack
reportModes.titleZh: 空間價值與親生物設計證明包
reportModes.summary: A client-facing pack showing how DR FOREST improves spatial use, visual focus, brand fit, maintainability and biophilic atmosphere.
reportModes.summaryZh: 面向客戶的證明包，展示 DR FOREST 如何提升空間使用、視覺焦點、品牌適配、可維護性與親生物氛圍。

reportModes.label: Impact Value
reportModes.title: Workplace, Health and Green Brand Impact Pack
reportModes.titleZh: 職場、健康與綠色品牌影響包
reportModes.summary: A proof-led pack covering Xponge health-safety evidence, employee experience indicators and green brand touchpoint value.
reportModes.summaryZh: 以證據為先的影響價值包，覆蓋 Xponge 健康安全證據、員工體驗指標與綠色品牌觸點價值。
evidenceZh: Xponge 基質與病蟲害台賬

reportModes.label: Robotic Care
reportModes.title: Autonomous Living Asset Care Readiness Pack
reportModes.titleZh: 自主活體資產看護準備度包
reportModes.summary: A forward-looking pack showing how DR FOREST OPS can support robot patrol, photo proof, water refill, nutrient dosing and human exception handoff.
reportModes.summaryZh: 面向未來的準備度包，展示 DR FOREST OPS 如何支持機器人巡檢、照片憑證、補水、營養液加注與人工異常交接。

reportModes.label: Audit Trail
reportModes.title: Green Asset Service Audit Trail
reportModes.titleZh: 綠色資產服務審計追蹤
reportModes.summary: A governance pack that shows who visited, what was checked, which photos were captured and how each claim is supported.
reportModes.summaryZh: 治理證明包，展示誰到訪、檢查了什麼、採集了哪些照片，以及每一項主張如何被證據支持。

strategyCards.title: Positioning
strategyCards.body: A vertical operating system for DR FOREST's recurring green assets, with Wall as the first high-value wedge and AI as the intelligence layer.

strategyCards.title: Audience
strategyCards.body: Designed for facility teams, asset managers and customer-facing venue operators.

strategyCards.title: Image
strategyCards.body: More enterprise dashboard than garden app: restrained UI, proof-first language, clear service actions.

strategyCards.title: Moat
strategyCards.body: Standardized wall modules, Plant Pod records, Xponge replacement cycles and DR FOREST diagnosis history.

strategyCards.title: AI layer
strategyCards.body: AI turns service history, sensors, proof records and renewal signals into human-reviewed recommendations.

strategyCards.title: Spatial expertise
strategyCards.body: Senior design experience is operationalized into spatial diagnosis, viewpoint control, design intent and renewal proof.

strategyCards.title: Impact layer
strategyCards.body: Xponge, employee experience and green brand value are tracked as evidence-led impact indicators rather than loose marketing promises.

strategyCards.title: Robotics-ready
strategyCards.body: The OPS model is structured so future robots can patrol, photograph, refill, dose nutrients and escalate exceptions through the same ledger.

platformThesis.title: Investor thesis
platformThesis.value: From rental service to AI-native asset OS
platformThesis.body: The app turns each living product into a managed asset with contract value, service history, health risk, ESG evidence, AI predictions and renewal proof.

platformThesis.title: Wedge
platformThesis.body: DR FOREST Wall stays the demo hero because it is visual, high-ticket, service-heavy and easiest to prove operational leverage.

platformThesis.title: Expansion
platformThesis.body: Pots, plant clusters, green partitions and seasonal displays can use the same site, protocol, work order, proof and ESG model.

platformThesis.title: Moat
platformThesis.body: Health scores, replacement cycles, route cost, survival rates and proof packs compound into data that a pure rental operator does not own.

platformThesis.title: AI leverage
platformThesis.body: AI recommends care timing, proof gaps, stock demand and renewal actions while keeping FM leads accountable for approval.

platformThesis.title: Design moat
platformThesis.body: Architectural and interior design judgment turns green rental into measurable spatial uplift, not commodity plant supply.

platformThesis.title: Impact moat
platformThesis.value: From greenery to workplace and brand value
platformThesis.body: The platform can show how low-disease living assets, staff-facing comfort and visible green brand touchpoints support retention and client ROI.

platformThesis.title: Automation moat
platformThesis.body: Once module interfaces, proof capture and safety controls are standardized, DR FOREST can move from scheduled maintenance to 24h robotic watch.

assetClasses.label: DR FOREST Wall
assetClasses.fit: Highest-value wedge with modules, pods, sensors, SLA, proof photos and clear renewal value.
assetClasses.monetization: Rental, care subscription, ESG report pack and renewal proof.

assetClasses.label: Plant Pod / Pot Rental
assetClasses.fit: Recurring office plant rental with replacement risk, route visits and client-visible quality requirements.
assetClasses.monetization: Monthly rental, replacement plan and care bundle.

assetClasses.label: Office Green Cluster
assetClasses.fit: Grouped desk, pantry and lounge plants can be managed as a site-level asset rather than single pots.
assetClasses.monetization: Wellness package, office refresh plan and account expansion.

assetClasses.label: Green Partition / Mobile Wall
assetClasses.fit: A spatial product with similar service complexity to Wall and stronger workplace design value.
assetClasses.monetization: Premium rental, event add-on and space planning upsell.

assetClasses.label: Lobby / Retail Seasonal Display
assetClasses.fit: Short-cycle green installations need setup proof, teardown tasks, replacement control and client sign-off.
assetClasses.monetization: Campaign package, venue retainer and proof-of-service archive.

assetClasses.label: Smart Planter / IAQ Add-on
assetClasses.fit: Adds data depth when sensors and indoor air quality integrations become production-ready.
assetClasses.monetization: Hardware margin, monitoring fee and data subscription.

assetClasses.label: Preserved Moss / Bio-based Decor
assetClasses.fit: Useful for green interior coverage, but not a living asset unless it has service, proof and renewal obligations.
assetClasses.monetization: Project sale, refresh plan and design maintenance.

expansionRoadmap.label: Wall Operating System
expansionRoadmap.proof: Control Center already covers service, sensors, incidents, proof, ESG, billing, compliance and reports.
expansionRoadmap.investorQuestion: Can one high-value product prove recurring operations and retention?

expansionRoadmap.label: Multi-Asset Ledger
expansionRoadmap.proof: Abstract wall records into asset type, site, care protocol, health score and service ledger.
expansionRoadmap.investorQuestion: Can the same workflow manage pots, clusters, partitions and displays?

expansionRoadmap.label: Customer Proof Portal
expansionRoadmap.proof: Give clients live access to service proof, ESG summary, renewal value and issue resolution.
expansionRoadmap.investorQuestion: Does the platform increase renewal rate and account expansion?

expansionRoadmap.label: Living Asset Intelligence
expansionRoadmap.proof: Use accumulated health, replacement, sensor, proof and route data for AI risk scoring, demand planning, ESG evidence drafting and predictive care.
expansionRoadmap.investorQuestion: Does DR FOREST own proprietary operating data?

expansionRoadmap.label: Autonomous Care Network
expansionRoadmap.proof: Use robot-ready modules, patrol logs, photo proof, refill records and nutrient dosing records to extend care frequency beyond human visit cadence.
expansionRoadmap.investorQuestion: Can DR FOREST turn recurring green FM into robotics-enabled operating leverage?

investorBenchmarks.signal: $150M Series D, $2.5B valuation, later Autodesk acquisition announcement
investorBenchmarks.lesson: Investors value frontline workflows when asset data, work orders and AI-ready maintenance history compound.

investorBenchmarks.signal: $35M Series B led by Dragoneer with Brookfield Growth participation
investorBenchmarks.lesson: Property operators pay for a unified layer across CMMS, IoT, sustainability and mobile field execution.

investorBenchmarks.signal: $93M Series D with 16B sqft real estate install base
investorBenchmarks.lesson: ESG becomes valuable when it connects measured assets, customer reporting and capital-market language.

investorBenchmarks.signal: EUR150M Series C for ESG data intelligence and net-zero transition
investorBenchmarks.lesson: The story should connect operational data to asset value, disclosure readiness and investment planning.

investorBenchmarks.signal: $90M Series B for AI-powered building monitoring
investorBenchmarks.lesson: Real-time building data wins when it reduces waste, protects service quality and creates sustainability evidence.
